steps.title: Factor the left side
steps.content:
Notice that the first two terms share the factor $(7x - 2a)$:
$$x(7x - 2a) + b(7x - 2a) - (x + b) = 0$$
Factor out $(7x - 2a)$:
$$(7x - 2a)(x + b) - (x + b) = 0$$
Now factor out $(x + b)$:
$$(x + b)(7x - 2a - 1) = 0$$

steps.title: Identify which factor gives x = 36
steps.content:
The factored form gives two solutions. Either $x + b = 0$, so $x = -b$ (negative since $b \gt 0$), or $7x - 2a - 1 = 0$, so $x = \frac{2a + 1}{7}$. Since $x = 36$ is a positive solution, it must satisfy the second equation:
$$\frac{2a + 1}{7} = 36$$

steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 7:
$$2a + 1 = 252$$
Subtract 1:
$$2a = 251$$
Divide by 2:
$$a = \frac{251}{2}$$
Equivalent forms accepted: 251/2, 125.5.
